metadata.name: crypt-startup
metadata.title: 🔐 Welcome, Crypt Guardian - Secure Your Vault

story.introduction: ⚡ Hail, Guardian of the Crypt! Your role is to protect and secure sensitive information. Let's establish your security protocols.
story.context: Crypt users have enhanced security features and protected storage areas for sensitive work.
story.purpose: Configure security settings and protected storage areas

variables.name: SECURITY-PROFILE
variables.prompt: What level of security do you require?
variables.help: Higher security means more protection but additional verification steps

variables.name: SENSITIVE-DATA-TYPES
variables.description: Types of sensitive data to protect
variables.prompt: What type of sensitive data will you store?
variables.help: This helps us configure appropriate protection measures

variables.name: ACCESS-VERIFICATION
variables.prompt: How do you want to verify access to protected areas?
variables.help: More secure methods provide better protection for your crypt
